name: DSPPA Digitally Steerable Speaker
description: Advanced line-array digitally steerable speaker with software and hardware DSP components delivering high speech intelligibility, music enhancement, and complete loudspeaker system diagnostics and monitoring.

name: DSPPA Professional Speaker
description: Professional speakers as essential components of conference systems, available from single units to a full wall of interlinked speakers for any venue size.

name: DSPPA Professional Amplifier
description: Professional amplifier system with balanced power and audio signal options, available in lightweight portable and stationary configurations for churches, theaters, and conference environments.

name: DSPPA Audio Processor
description: Top-of-the-line audio processor with precise equalization, adjustable crossover, signal delay, and signal summing/distribution for superior audio quality and functionality.

name: DSPPA Audio Conferencing System
description: Complete digital conference system for rooms of all sizes. A reference in conferencing technology offering powerful audio and video connections for professional environments.

name: DSPPA Line Array Speaker
description: Easy to configure, exceedingly light, and tremendously versatile line array speaker system optimised for auditorium sound with high-quality speech and music playback.

name: Megaphone Solution
description: Professional megaphone for police and crowd control with 200m range, voice enhance, alarm siren, built-in HD camera, USB, tuner, LED torch, volume control, and voice recording with Li-Ion or dry battery support.

name: JBL Subwoofers
description: Feel the room shake with low-frequency bass. JBL subwoofers create a thrilling listening environment for immersive home and professional audio experiences.

name: JBL Bookshelf Speakers
description: Compact and powerful JBL bookshelf speakers delivering crystal-clear audio for an immersive listening experience in any room.

name: JBL Stereo Hi-Fi Electronics
description: Stereo Hi-Fi components designed as the perfect companions to JBL loudspeakers, delivering high-fidelity audio performance.

name: JBL Floor-Standing Speakers
description: Powerful sound and bold design for any room. JBL floor-standing and Bluetooth tower speakers deliver impactful audio for home and professional environments.

name: EIKI EK-129X Laser Projector
description: 5,000 Lumens XGA (1024x768) laser projector with 4:3 aspect ratio, lampless blue laser and phosphor technology, and 3LCD display engine for reliable long-life projection.

name: EIKI EK-130U Laser Projector
description: 5,000 Lumens WUXGA (1920x1200) laser projector with 16:10 aspect ratio, 2 HDMI inputs (1 with MHL), Crestron RoomView and AMX Device Discovery compatibility, and 3LCD engine.

name: EIKI EK-500LU Laser Projector
description: 5,000 Lumens WUXGA (1920x1200) laser projector with 16:10 aspect ratio, lampless laser technology (Blue + Phosphor), and 3LCD engine for professional installations.

name: EIKI Entry Level Projector
description: Entry-level projector designed for everyday use, offering clear visuals, simple setup, and reliable performance. Ideal for home, office, or classroom presentations balancing affordability with essential features.

name: EIKI Boardroom Projector
description: High-performance boardroom projector delivering bright, sharp visuals with advanced connectivity for seamless integration with laptops and conferencing systems in corporate environments.

name: EIKI Short Throw Projector
description: Short throw projector engineered to deliver large, bright images from a short distance. Perfect for classrooms, offices, and small spaces, minimising shadows and glare while maximising clarity.

name: Basic Monitor 19-inch
description: Compact 19-inch high-quality monitor for basic everyday use, suitable for workstations with limited desk space.

name: Office Monitor 22-inch
description: 22-inch office monitor offering clear visuals and reliable performance for everyday office tasks and productivity.

name: Standard Monitor 24-inch
description: 24-inch standard monitor delivering sharp, accurate display for general professional use and multimedia consumption.

name: Professional Monitor 27-inch
description: 27-inch professional-grade monitor ideal for design, content creation, and detailed professional tasks requiring accurate colour and resolution.

name: Wide Monitor 32-inch
description: 32-inch wide-format monitor offering expansive screen real estate for multitasking, professional workflows, and immersive viewing.

name: Ultra-Wide Monitor 34-inch
description: 34-inch ultra-wide monitor designed for demanding professional tasks, offering exceptional horizontal workspace and immersive visuals.

name: Interactive Smart Board 65-inch
description: Compact 65-inch smart board with multi-touch interaction, wireless sharing, and collaboration tools. Ideal for classrooms and small meeting rooms.

name: Interactive Smart Board 75-inch
description: Versatile 75-inch smart board offering bright visuals, responsive touch, and seamless connectivity. Perfect for boardrooms, training, and education.

name: Interactive Smart Board 85-inch
description: Large 85-inch interactive smart board with wide display, powerful conferencing features, and seamless collaboration tools for corporate and educational use.

name: Interactive Smart Board 98-inch
description: Expansive 98-inch smart board ideal for auditoriums, executive meetings, and large classrooms. Stunning visuals, multi-touch interactivity, and advanced collaboration tools.

name: Smart TVs for Digital Signage
description: Commercial smart TVs delivering vibrant, high-resolution displays for advertisements, announcements, and information boards. Built-in connectivity and easy content management for retail, offices, and public spaces.

name: LED Wall Display
description: Seamless high-resolution LED walls for large-scale digital signage, events, and presentations. Vibrant colours, wide viewing angles, and flexible sizing for auditoriums, retail, control rooms, and outdoor advertising.

name: Tripod Projector Screen
description: Portable, foldable projection screen with tripod stand. Ideal for presentations in classrooms, offices, or small meeting spaces requiring easy setup and mobility.

name: Manual Projector Screen
description: Wall-mounted retractable screen with manual pull-down operation. Simple, reliable, and space-saving for classrooms or boardrooms.

name: Motorised Projector Screen
description: Electric retractable screen with remote control operation. Perfect for boardrooms, auditoriums, or professional presentations requiring convenience and ease.

name: DSPPA HD Web Camera
description: High-quality web camera with HD or Full HD resolution, built-in microphone, and plug-and-play connectivity. Compact and easy to mount for remote meetings, online teaching, and content creation.

name: Yealink Video Conference System
description: HD audio and video conferencing solution for small to large meeting rooms with reliable connectivity, intuitive controls, and seamless PC integration for hybrid work environments.

name: Yealink All-in-One Panel
description: All-in-one video conference panel combining camera, microphone, speaker, and touch control in a single device. Designed for small to medium meeting rooms with seamless integration.
image: /uploads/YEALINK All in one panel video conference solutions.png

name: Polycom Video Conference System
description: High-definition audio and video conferencing system designed for boardrooms and offices. Provides clear communication, reliable connectivity, and easy integration with laptops and networks.

name: Local Area Network Solution
description: Complete LAN solution connecting computers, devices, and servers within offices, buildings, or campuses. Enables high-speed data transfer, resource sharing, internet access, and secure communication.

name: Huawei Wi-Fi Access Points
description: Enterprise-grade Huawei access points providing reliable wireless connectivity for offices, campuses, and public spaces with high-speed Wi-Fi, seamless roaming, and secure network access.

name: Huawei PoE Network Switch
description: Power over Ethernet switch delivering both power and data over Ethernet to devices like IP cameras and phones. Ideal for simplified deployments without separate power cabling.

name: Huawei Non-PoE Network Switch
description: Standard Huawei network switch for data-only connectivity. Reliable and straightforward for office and small network setups.

name: Huawei Web Managed Switch
description: Network switch with web interface for configuration and monitoring. Offers moderate control and network management features for growing business networks.

name: Huawei Fully Managed Switch
description: Advanced enterprise switch with full Layer 2/3 features, VLANs, QoS, and monitoring. Suitable for networks requiring complete control and high performance.

name: Huawei Core Switch
description: High-performance core switch for central network backbone. Supports large-scale traffic, redundancy, and advanced routing for enterprise-grade network infrastructure.

name: Network Firewall
description: Network security device that monitors and controls incoming and outgoing traffic based on predefined rules. Protects networks from unauthorized access, cyber threats, and malware.

name: Enterprise Server
description: High-performance server providing data, applications, and services over a network. Designed for reliability, scalability, and continuous operation supporting virtualization and enterprise applications.

name: Fiber Structured Cabling
description: High-speed, reliable network connectivity using optical fiber cables. Ideal for enterprise, campus, and data center networks supporting long-distance communication and high bandwidth.

name: Wall Mounted Network Rack
description: Compact rack mounted on the wall for small networks. Ideal for saving space while securely housing servers, switches, and patch panels.

name: Floor Stand Network Rack
description: Free-standing rack for medium to large networks. Provides robust support and organized installation of networking equipment in server rooms and data centers.

name: Cable Trays and Trunking
description: Cable management accessories for organized, safe, and professional cable routing. Reduces clutter and maintains network performance in server rooms and data centers.

name: Hikvision Analog Camera System
description: Traditional CCTV system with analog cameras for reliable basic surveillance. Records video to DVRs and is ideal for small to medium installations.

name: Hikvision Network Camera System
description: Digital IP camera system providing high-definition video over LAN. Supports remote access, advanced analytics, and scalable security for enterprise or campus environments.

name: Hikvision Wireless Camera System
description: Wi-Fi enabled cameras for flexible, cable-free installation. Ideal for homes or offices providing easy setup, remote monitoring, and real-time alerts.

name: Fixed Fingerprint Machine
description: Biometric device for secure access control and attendance management. Fast, accurate fingerprint recognition with multiple user profile storage. Ideal for offices, factories, and restricted areas.

name: Portable Fingerprint Machine
description: Compact, mobile biometric device for on-the-go identity verification and attendance tracking. Fast, accurate fingerprint recognition and easy data transfer for field or remote use.

name: Face and Biometric Detector
description: Advanced access control device combining facial recognition and biometric authentication. Fast, accurate, and secure identification for offices, factories, and high-security areas.

name: Access Control System
description: Comprehensive security solution for managing entry and exit of personnel. Supports keycards, biometric, or PIN access for secure, monitored, and efficient control of restricted areas.

name: Video Door Phone
description: Secure real-time audio and video communication at entry points. Ideal for homes, offices, and gated communities allowing remote access control and visitor monitoring.

name: Automatic Gate Barrier System
description: Motorised barrier system for secure vehicle access control. Ideal for offices, parking lots, and gated communities with fast operation, safety sensors, and reliable automated entry management.

name: Entry Level Fire Alarm System
description: Basic fire detection system for small offices or buildings. Provides reliable smoke and heat detection with simple installation and easy monitoring.

name: Industrial Fire Alarm System
description: Advanced fire detection for factories, warehouses, and large facilities. Multi-sensor detection, robust alerts, and integration with industrial safety systems for high-risk environments.

name: Micro SD Card
description: Compact, high-speed Micro SD cards for cameras, mobile devices, and embedded systems. Available in various capacities for reliable portable data storage.

name: CD and DVD Media
description: Optical storage media for data archiving, software distribution, and multimedia. Available in recordable and rewritable formats for long-term data preservation.

name: Pendrive USB Flash Drive
description: Portable USB flash drives for quick and easy data transfer. Available in multiple capacities with plug-and-play functionality for all operating systems.

name: Internal Hard Disk
description: High-capacity internal hard disk drives for desktop and server use. Reliable, cost-effective storage for operating systems, applications, and data.

name: Portable Hard Disk
description: Compact portable hard disk drives for data backup and transfer on the go. USB-powered for convenient use without external power.

name: Asustor NAS Storage
description: High-capacity NAS devices supporting file sharing, backup, multimedia streaming, and remote access. Includes RAID protection, advanced security, and scalable storage for home and business networks.

name: Line Interactive UPS
description: Stable power backup with automatic voltage regulation (AVR). Ideal for offices, computers, and small servers, protecting equipment from power fluctuations and outages.

name: Online UPS
description: Continuous, high-quality power with double-conversion technology. Zero transfer time and maximum protection for critical equipment, data centers, and industrial applications.

name: Power Backup Solution
description: Comprehensive power backup solutions including generators and battery systems for homes, offices, data centers, and industrial environments. Minimises downtime and protects sensitive electronics.

name: Solar Energy Solution
description: Sustainable solar solutions including solar panels, inverters, and storage systems for homes, businesses, and industrial applications with reduced grid dependence.

name: Cool Room Monitoring System
description: Real-time temperature and humidity monitoring for cold storage rooms. Provides instant alerts to ensure product quality and prevent spoilage.

name: Freezer Truck GPS Monitoring System
description: Combined temperature, humidity, and GPS location tracking for refrigerated vehicles. Ensures safe transport of perishable goods with real-time alerts and route visibility.

name: Centralized Industrial Environmental Monitor
description: Monitors multiple environmental parameters across industrial facilities. Centralized data collection, alerts, and reporting for temperature, humidity, air quality, and operational efficiency.

name: Desktop Computer
description: High-performance desktop computers for office productivity, creative work, and professional applications. Configurable specifications to meet business and personal computing needs.

name: Laptop Computer
description: Portable laptop computers offering performance and mobility for business, education, and professional use. Available in various configurations for diverse computing requirements.

name: Computer Accessories
description: Essential computer peripherals and accessories including keyboards, mice, headsets, and more to enhance productivity and user experience.

name: XLR Audio Cable
description: Professional XLR cables for balanced audio signal transmission between microphones, mixers, and amplifiers. Built for low noise and durability in live and studio environments.

name: Speaker Cable
description: High-quality speaker cables for connecting amplifiers to loudspeakers. Designed for minimal signal loss and maximum audio fidelity.

name: VGA Cable
description: Standard VGA cables for connecting computers and laptops to monitors and projectors. Reliable analog video signal transmission.

name: HDMI Cable Copper
description: High-speed copper HDMI cables supporting full HD and 4K video transmission with audio. Ideal for shorter-distance AV installations.

name: HDMI Cable Fiber Optic
description: Fiber optic HDMI cables for long-distance high-definition signal transmission without quality loss. Ideal for professional AV and digital signage installations.

name: SDI Cable
description: Serial Digital Interface cables for professional broadcast-quality video transmission. Standard for cameras, switchers, and professional video equipment.

name: CAT 6 STP Network Cable
description: Category 6 shielded twisted pair cable offering enhanced protection against electromagnetic interference. Ideal for industrial or electrically noisy environments.

name: CAT 6 Patch Code
description: Pre-terminated CAT 6 patch cables for connecting network devices to patch panels and switches. Available in various lengths for flexible network installations.

name: Telephone Cable
description: Standard telephone cabling for voice communication infrastructure in offices and commercial buildings.

name: Single Mode Fiber Optic Cable
description: Single mode fiber cable for long-distance, high-bandwidth network connections with minimal signal attenuation. Ideal for campus and enterprise backbone installations.

name: Multi-Mode Fiber Optic Cable
description: Multi-mode fiber cable for shorter-distance high-speed data transmission within buildings and data centers.

name: Fiber Patch Code
description: Pre-terminated fiber patch cables for connecting fiber devices within patch panels and network equipment rooms.

name: Fiber Pigtail
description: Single-end fiber connectors used in fiber optic splicing for connecting fiber cables to equipment through a splice tray.

name: UTP Patch Panel
description: Rack-mounted patch panel for organizing and managing UTP network cable terminations in server rooms and data centers.

name: Keystone Jack
description: Modular keystone connectors for terminating network cables into wall plates and patch panels. Compatible with CAT 5e and CAT 6.

name: Network Faceplate
description: Wall-mounted faceplates for housing keystone jacks and providing clean, professional cable termination points in offices and classrooms.

name: RJ45 Jacks
description: Standard RJ45 connectors for terminating CAT 5e and CAT 6 network cables. Essential for network installations and patch panel terminations.

name: Networking Tools
description: Essential networking installation tools including crimping tools, punch-down tools, cable strippers, and testers for professional network cabling.

name: Fiber Optic Accessories
description: Complete range of fiber optic accessories including cleaners, adapters, couplers, and splice protectors for professional fiber installations.

name: PoE Surge Protectors
description: Surge protection devices for Power over Ethernet networks, safeguarding IP cameras, access points, and phones from electrical surges.

name: VGA Switch
description: Allows multiple VGA sources (PCs, laptops) to connect to a single display. Ideal for meeting rooms, classrooms, or control centers requiring easy source selection.

name: VGA Splitter
description: Duplicates a single VGA signal to multiple displays simultaneously. Perfect for presentations, digital signage, or environments needing simultaneous display across several screens.

name: HDMI Switch
description: Connects multiple HDMI sources (laptops, media players, consoles) to a single display. Ideal for home theaters, meeting rooms, and classrooms for easy source selection.

name: HDMI Splitter
description: Duplicates a single HDMI signal to multiple displays simultaneously. Perfect for presentations, digital signage, or simultaneous content viewing across several screens.

name: VGA Extender
description: Extends VGA video signals over long distances using CAT5/CAT6 cabling. Ideal for classrooms, conference rooms, and control centers requiring distant display setups.

name: HDMI Extender
description: Transmits HDMI signals over long distances without quality loss. Suitable for home theaters, digital signage, and professional AV installations needing high-definition content at extended range.

name: Fiber to UTP Converter
description: Converts optical fiber signals to Ethernet (UTP) for seamless integration between fiber and copper networks. Ideal for extending network reach and connecting devices over long distances.
